name: Cherry Pie I.e.s.jjgf65a
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons cornstarch (or 3 tablespoons if cherries are still high in moisture)
Red tart cherries, pitted and thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. If the cherries are extremely well defrosted and drained, use 2 tablespoons cornstarch; if they still have a high moisture content, use 3 tablespoons.
3. In a medium saucepan, combine sugar, cornstarch, and salt until well mixed and lump-free.
4. Gradually add cherry juice to the mixture, stirring until smooth.
5. Cook over medium heat and stir until thick and clear.
6. Stir in butter, almond extract, and red food coloring.
7. Cool for 10 minutes.
8. Gently toss cherries with juice to coat.
9. Spoon into an unbaled pie shell.
10. Add a vented top pastry or lattice strips, flute edges, and cover fluted edges with foil strips.
11. Bake for 30 minutes.
12. Remove foil and return to oven for 10 more minutes.
13. Check that the filling is simmering before removing from oven.
14. Cool on rack. Makes one 9-inch pie.
